name: W_CIDeconvolve
description: 3D/2D deconvolution for widefield and confocal microscopy images using CI SHB-accelerated Richardson-Lucy with optional Total Variation regularisation. Supports GPU acceleration via CUDA (PyTorch).

inputs.name: RL iterations
inputs.description: Number of RL iterations per channel, comma-separated. A single value applies to all channels. Example: '150' or '150, 100, 200'.

inputs.name: Tiling
inputs.description: XY tiling mode for large images. 'none': disable tiling. 'custom': use tile size limits from the Tile limits parameter.

inputs.name: Tile limits
inputs.description: Maximum tile dimensions as 'max_xy, max_z'. Only used when Tiling is set to 'custom'. The image is split into the minimum number of XY tiles so each tile fits within these limits.

inputs.name: Deconvolution method
inputs.description: Which deconvolution algorithm to use. ci_rl: SHB-accelerated Richardson-Lucy. ci_rl_tv: same with Total Variation regularisation.

inputs.name: Compute device
inputs.description: Force compute device. 'auto' uses CUDA if available, otherwise CPU.

inputs.name: Numerical aperture
inputs.description: Override objective numerical aperture. 'auto' uses value from image metadata (default 1.4 if missing).

inputs.name: Immersion medium
inputs.description: Immersion medium refractive index for PSF generation. 'auto' uses value from image metadata (default: oil 1.515).

inputs.name: Sample / mounting medium
inputs.description: Refractive index of the sample or mounting medium for PSF generation. 'auto' uses image metadata if available, otherwise defaults to Vectashield (1.45).

inputs.name: Microscope type
inputs.description: Override microscope type for PSF model. 'auto' uses value from image metadata (default 'widefield' if missing). Confocal uses emission × excitation PSF when excitation wavelengths are provided.

inputs.name: Emission wavelengths
inputs.description: Override emission wavelengths in nm, comma-separated (one per channel). 'auto' uses values from image metadata (default 520 nm if missing). Example: '520, 600'.

inputs.name: Excitation wavelengths
inputs.description: Excitation wavelengths in nm, comma-separated (one per channel). Used for confocal PSF generation (emission × excitation model). 'auto' uses values from image metadata; falls back to squared emission PSF if unavailable. Example: '405, 488'.

inputs.name: TV lambda
inputs.description: Total Variation regularization strength for ci_rl_tv method. Ignored when method is ci_rl. Range 0–1, typical values 0.0001–0.01.

inputs.name: Background subtraction
inputs.description: Background subtraction mode. 'auto' estimates background automatically. A numeric value (e.g. 100) subtracts that constant. '0' disables background subtraction.

inputs.name: Damping
inputs.description: Damping factor for noise suppression. 'none' or '0' disables damping. 'auto' selects automatically. A numeric value sets a fixed damping factor (typical range 0.1–10).

inputs.name: Convergence mode
inputs.description: Early-stopping convergence check. 'auto' stops when relative change falls below the threshold. 'none' disables convergence checking and runs all iterations.

inputs.name: Convergence threshold
inputs.description: Relative change threshold for early stopping when convergence is 'auto'. Smaller values allow more iterations before stopping.

inputs.name: Pixel size XY (nm)
inputs.description: Override lateral pixel size in nanometers. 'auto' uses value from image metadata.

inputs.name: Pixel size Z (nm)
inputs.description: Override axial pixel size (Z step) in nanometers. 'auto' uses value from image metadata.

inputs.name: Z-projection
inputs.description: Output a 2D Z-projection instead of the full 3D stack. 'mip': maximum intensity projection, 'sum': sum projection, 'none': keep full 3D stack. Ignored for 2D input images.

inputs.name: Benchmark mode
inputs.description: Run benchmark: deconvolves the first input image with both ci_rl and ci_rl_tv at multiple iteration counts (20, 40, 60), writes a CSV with timing metrics, and generates MIP montage images.

inputs.name: Benchmark crop
inputs.description: When benchmark mode is active, centre-crop the image to tile-size limits before deconvolution. Speeds up the benchmark significantly for large images.
